chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C. P. No. D–4098 of 2015 [Highway Gasoline & others Vs. OGRA & others] DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). Priority 1. For order on CMA No.20314/2024 (U/O 23, S-151, R-1). 2. For hearing of Misc. No.31026/2021 (U/O I R-10). 3. For hearing of Misc. No.28876/2015. 4. For hearing of Misc. No.28877/2015. 5. For hearing of Misc. No.18103/2015. 6. For hearing of main case. 19.09.2024 Mr. Ayan Mustafa Memon, Advocate for the petitioners. Syeda Khizra Fatima Chishti, Advocate for respondents No.1 & 3. Mr. Khaleeq Ahmed, D.A.G..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. 1. This is an application for an unconditional withdrawal of this petition supported by affidavit of one Khurram Abdul Ghani. Apparently, he is not representing as an attorney of all the petitioners. Be that as it may, Mr. Ayan Mustafa Memon, learned counsel, appearing for all the petitioners makes a statement in support of the application that he has been instructed by all the petitioners to withdraw the petition unconditionally on behalf of all the petitioners; this is sufficient compliance made by the learned counsel. The petition is dismissed as not pressed alongwith all pending applications. CHIEF JUSTICE JUDGE Asif
